channel.title: Lians Blog
channel.description: Writing from the Lians team on regulated AI memory: bitemporal recall, audit chains, backtest contamination, and honest evals.

item.title: Their harness. Their judge. 92.9 on LOCOMO.
item.description: We scored Lians on LOCOMO using mem0's own open-source harness — their answer pipeline, their gpt-5 judge, unmodified. 92.9% vs their published 91.6, at 90% accuracy on one-seventh of full-context tokens. Receipts and caveats included.

item.title: Memory is a lifecycle, not a table
item.description: Lians v0.4.0: pre-compaction flush, conflict resurfacing, materiality-weighted decay, audited degraded retrieval, and a signed Markdown memory statement. Memory as a lifecycle, not a table.

item.title: Your backtest Sharpe is contaminated
item.description: Lookahead bias in AI agent memory silently inflates backtest results. FUTURE_EVENT is the obvious class; LATE_REVISION is the one vector stores can't even see. Here's the mechanism and the check.
